text: A seaman lawfully engaged can have his CDC suspended by DGS if he is

options.text: Delayed in returning back to the ship from shore
Unable to operate the crane to the satisfaction of the duty officer
Convicted of an offense of smuggling narcotics

explanation: A seaman convicted of smuggling narcotics commits a serious criminal offense that directly impacts their fitness to be at sea and can lead to the suspension of their Continuous Discharge Certificate (CDC).
